creator: venture37@geeklan.co.uk
text:
Before raising the bug I ran
vxquery /var/db/pkg/vuln.xml phpmyadmin
Which gave me:
Topic: phpmyadmin -- Cross Site Scripting
Affects:
    phpmyadmin < 2.11.2.2
References:
    cvename:CVE-2007-6100
    url:http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2007-8
    url:http://www.nth-dimension.org.uk/downloads.php?id=38
<URL:http://vuxml.freebsd.org/15485ae8-9848-11dc-9e48-0016179b2dd5.html>

Topic: phpmyadmin -- cross site scripting vulnerability
Affects:
    phpmyadmin < 2.6.2.r1
    phpMyAdmin < 2.6.2.r1
References:
    bid:12982
    cvename:CVE-2005-0992
    mlist:http://marc.theaimsgroup.com/?l=bugtraq&m=111264361622660
    url:http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2005-3
<URL:http://vuxml.freebsd.org/58247a96-01c8-11da-bc08-0001020eed82.html>

Topic: phpmyadmin -- increased privilege vulnerability
Affects:
    phpmyadmin < 2.6.1.3
    phpMyAdmin < 2.6.1.3
References:
    cvename:CVE-2005-0653
    url:http://sourceforge.net/forum/forum.php?forum_id=450948
    url:http://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=1113788&group_id=23067&atid=377408
<URL:http://vuxml.freebsd.org/6192ae3d-9595-11d9-a9e0-0001020eed82.html>

Topic: phpmyadmin -- information disclosure vulnerability
Affects:
    phpmyadmin < 2.6.1.2
    phpMyAdmin < 2.6.1.2
References:
    cvename:CVE-2005-0544
    url:http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2005-2
<URL:http://vuxml.freebsd.org/a7062952-9023-11d9-a22c-0001020eed82.html>

Topic: phpmyadmin -- remote command execution vulnerability
Affects:
    phpMyAdmin < 2.6.0.2
    phpmyadmin < 2.6.0.2
References:
    bid:11391
    url:http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=274709
    url:http://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=1044864&group_id=23067&atid=377408
<URL:http://vuxml.freebsd.org/fc07c9ca-22ce-11d9-814e-0001020eed82.html>

Turns out the thing is case sensitive!
Sorry about the noise.
